item.title: Pirro could reopen Fed probe at any time, Democratic senators warn
item.description: Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin, in a letter obtained first by CNBC, question Jeanine Pirro's mention of reopening a probe of Fed Chair Jerome ...

item.title: Analysis: The threat to the Fed's independence isn't over
item.description: President Donald Trump has waged a long campaign to rein in the Fed. Prosecutors' decision to drop an investigation into Jerome Powell isn't the end.

item.title: DOJ ends Powell probe, lifts hurdle for Trump’s Fed chair nominee Warsh
item.description: President Donald Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh to replace Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell had been effectively blocked because of the investig...

item.title: DOJ says it will use firing squads, electrocution again for federal executions
item.description: As the Trump administration resumes capital punishment, Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche instructed the Bureau of Prisons to modify its execution ...

item.title: Kushner, Witkoff heading to Pakistan for 'direct talks' with Iran, White House says
item.description: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.
